name: algovista
description: Correctness-first semantic traces for accessible algorithm visualization
author: Nguyen Gia Phu

scripts.test: npm run test:compile && node --test dist-test/tests/*.test.js && node --test scripts/release-tools.test.mjs
scripts.demo:generate: npm run build && node scripts/generate-demo.mjs demo/evidence
scripts.release:verify: npm run build && npm run demo:verify && node scripts/verify-release.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run verify:budgets && npm run release:verify && npm audit --audit-level=high
